creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
I managed to build it with gcc-4.7.3_1 by putting the following to make.conf:

.if ${.CURDIR:M*/net-p2p/linuxdcpp} 
USE_GCC?=yes 
.endif

However, the program won't start, it dumps core:

pacija@kaa:~ % gdb /usr/local/bin/linuxdcpp linuxdcpp.core
